notes.sg-programming-language-logic-programmin: The label is too broad; 'programming' is implied by the parent topic. 'logic and type systems' is more specific.
notes.sg-programming-language-approximate-stri: This is a good general topic. The Commentz-Walter algorithm and string searching algorithms are specific instances or closely related concepts that can be merged into this broader topic.
notes.sg-programming-language-commentz-walter-: This is a specific algorithm that is a type of approximate string matching.
notes.sg-programming-language-pattern-matching: This is a specific type of string searching/matching.
notes.sg-programming-language-string-searching: This is a general category that approximate string matching falls under, and Commentz-Walter is a specific algorithm.
notes.sg-programming-language-automata-theory-: The label is a bit awkward. 'automata theory and formal languages' is a more standard phrasing.
